name: Barley Risotto with Shrimp Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 10 large shrimp, peeled and cut into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add shallot and cook, stirring until translucent.
3. Add barley; stir to coat with the oil.
4. Reduce heat to medium.
5. Continue cooking barley, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes. Do not let it brown.
6. While the barley is cooking, bring vegetable stock to a boil.
7. Gradually add vegetable stock to barley, one cup at a time, stirring after each addition until almost absorbed.
8. Keep adding liquid and stirring frequently until barley pearls are al dente, about 45 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, cut eggplant into 1/2-inch cubes.
10. Heat 4 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
11. Saute eggplant, stirring frequently, until soft, about 12 minutes.
12. Set aside the sautéed eggplant.
13. Using the same skillet, add the remaining tablespoon of oil.
14. Saute shrimp until pink.
15. When barley is done, stir in the sautéed eggplant and shrimp.
16. Add grated pecorino cheese.
17. Serve.
